# daytona_sandbox_build_logs_url (Data Source)

Reads a build logs URL for a Daytona sandbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_build_logs_url" "example" {
  sandbox_id_or_name = "my-sandbox"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `url` (String, Sensitive) Sandbox build logs URL.
